requestBody.description:
# task.deleted

The **Task deleted** event is triggered every time a task is delete by one of your app users or account users.

## Prerequisites

* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* The **Task deleted** subscription enabled under the **Task** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `tasks:read:admin`,`tasks:read`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `tasks:read:task`,`tasks:read:task:admin`

**Event type**: `task.deleted`

event_ts.description: The timestamp of when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who deleted the task.

operator.description: The email of the user who deleted the task.

operator_id.description: The user ID of the user who deleted the task.

description.description: The detailed description of the task.

PriorityId-Tasks.description: The priority level of the task.

StatusId-Tasks.description: The current status of the task.

DueDate-Tasks.description:
The due date of the task in UTC.
 Format: yyyy-mm-dd.

IsPublic-Tasks.description:
Determines the task’s visibility.
true: The task is accessible to all members of your organization.
false: The task is accessible only to the assigned users and collaborators.

event_ts.description: The timestamp of when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who deleted the task.

operator.description: The email of the user who deleted the task.

operator_id.description: The user ID of the user who deleted the task.

description.description: The detailed description of the task.

PriorityId-Tasks.description: The priority level of the task.

StatusId-Tasks.description: The current status of the task.

DueDate-Tasks.description:
The due date of the task in UTC.
 Format: yyyy-mm-dd.

IsPublic-Tasks.description:
Determines the task’s visibility.
true: The task is accessible to all members of your organization.
false: The task is accessible only to the assigned users and collaborators.

requestBody.description:
# task.updated

The **Task was updated** event is triggered every time a task is updated.

## Prerequisites

* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* The **Task was updated** subscription enabled under the **Task** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `tasks:read:admin`,`tasks:read`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `tasks:read:task`,`tasks:read:task:admin`

**Event type**: `task.updated`

event_ts.description: The timestamp of when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who updated the task.

operator.description: The email of the user who updated the task.

operator_id.description:
The Zoom user ID of the operator who closed the task. 
 It should be null if the user is external to the task's organization.

field_changes.description: The list of field changes in this update.

field_name.description: The name of the field that was changed.

old_value.description: The previous value of the field.

new_value.description: The new value of the field.

operation_type.description: The operation performed on the field.

changed_at.description: The unix timestamp when the field was changed.

file_changes.description: The list of file changes in this update.

file_id.description: The unique identifier of the file.

file_type.description: The MIME type of the file.

file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

file_download_link.description: The temporary download link for the file.

download_link_expire_time.description: The unix timestamp when the download link expires.

operation_type.description: The operation performed on the attachment.

changed_at.description: The unix timestamp when the attachment was changed.

event_ts.description: The timestamp of when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who updated the task.

operator.description: The email of the user who updated the task.

operator_id.description:
The Zoom user ID of the operator who closed the task. 
 It should be null if the user is external to the task's organization.

field_changes.description: The list of field changes in this update.

field_name.description: The name of the field that was changed.

old_value.description: The previous value of the field.

new_value.description: The new value of the field.

operation_type.description: The operation performed on the field.

changed_at.description: The unix timestamp when the field was changed.

file_changes.description: The list of file changes in this update.

file_id.description: The unique identifier of the file.

file_type.description: The MIME type of the file.

file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

file_download_link.description: The temporary download link for the file.

download_link_expire_time.description: The unix timestamp when the download link expires.

operation_type.description: The operation performed on the attachment.

changed_at.description: The unix timestamp when the attachment was changed.

requestBody.description:
# task.comment_updated

The **Task comment was updated** event is triggered every time a task comment is updated to task.

## Prerequisites

* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* The **Task comment was updated** subscription enabled under the **Task** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `tasks_comment:read`,`tasks_comment:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `tasks:read:comments`,`tasks:read:comments:admin`

**Event type**: `task.comment_updated`

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who updated the comment with a task.

operator.description: The email of the user who updated the comment with a task.

operator_id.description: The user ID of the user who updated the comment with a task.

comment.description: The comments that had been added, removed, or updated.

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who updated the comment with a task.

operator.description: The email of the user who updated the comment with a task.

operator_id.description: The user ID of the user who updated the comment with a task.

comment.description: The comments that had been added, removed, or updated.

requestBody.description:
# task.collaborator_updated

The **Task collaborator were updated** event is triggered every time a task collaborator is added or deleted to share a task with a Zoom user

## Prerequisites

* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* The **Task collaborator were updated** subscription enabled under the **Task** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `tasks_collaborator:read`,`tasks_collaborator:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `tasks:read:list_collaborators`,`tasks:read:list_collaborators:admin`

**Event type**: `task.collaborator_updated`

event_ts.description: A timestamp of when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who updated the collaborators of the task.

operator.description: The email of the user who updated the collaborators of the task.

operator_id.description: The Zoom user ID of the operator who updated the collaborators of the task.

collaborators.description: Collaborators that has been added or removed.

user_id.description: The Zoom user ID of the collaborator.

display_name.description: The display name of the collaborator.

email.description: The email address of the collaborator.

avatar.description: The avatar image URL of the collaborator.

event_ts.description: A timestamp of when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who updated the collaborators of the task.

operator.description: The email of the user who updated the collaborators of the task.

operator_id.description: The Zoom user ID of the operator who updated the collaborators of the task.

collaborators.description: Collaborators that has been added or removed.

user_id.description: The Zoom user ID of the collaborator.

display_name.description: The display name of the collaborator.

email.description: The email address of the collaborator.

avatar.description: The avatar image URL of the collaborator.

requestBody.description:
# task.created

The **Task was created** event is triggered every time a task is created by one of your app users or account users.

Zoom offers multiple methods for users to create a new task. Users can manually create tasks in the Zoom client or the [Zoom web portal](https://zoom.us/). Users can also programmatically create tasks via the [**Create a new task**] API.

## Prerequisites

* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* The **Task was created** subscription enabled under the **Task** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `tasks:read:admin`,`tasks:read`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `tasks:read:task`,`tasks:read:task:admin`

**Event type**: `task.created`

event_ts.description: A timestamp of when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who created the task.

operator.description: The email of the user who created the task.

operator_id.description: The user ID of the user who created the task.

starred.description: Indicates whether the task is marked as starred.

collaborators.description: A list of collaborators to invite to the task. Maximum user count is 20.

user_id.description: The collaborator's user to invite. The invited user must belong to the same account as the requesting user.

link.description: The direct URL link to the task.

assignees.description: A list of assignees to add to the task.

DueDate-Tasks.description: The task's due date in UTC, formatted as yyyy-MM-dd.

IsPublic-Tasks.description:
The task's visibility.
- true - The task is accessible to all members of your organization.
- false - The task is accessible only to the assigned users and collaborators.

source_type-Tasks.description: Type of the source that created the task.

event_ts.description: A timestamp of when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who created the task.

operator.description: The email of the user who created the task.

operator_id.description: The user ID of the user who created the task.

starred.description: Indicates whether the task is marked as starred.

collaborators.description: A list of collaborators to invite to the task. Maximum user count is 20.

user_id.description: The collaborator's user to invite. The invited user must belong to the same account as the requesting user.

link.description: The direct URL link to the task.

assignees.description: A list of assignees to add to the task.

DueDate-Tasks.description: The task's due date in UTC, formatted as yyyy-MM-dd.

IsPublic-Tasks.description:
The task's visibility.
- true - The task is accessible to all members of your organization.
- false - The task is accessible only to the assigned users and collaborators.

source_type-Tasks.description: Type of the source that created the task.
